title: API reference for `/libpod/info` lists wrong response
body:
### Issue Description

The API reference for the [ `/libpod/info` endpoint](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v4.5#tag/system/operation/SystemInfoLibpod) lists the wrong response.

It should look similar to the [previous version](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v4.4#tag/system/operation/SystemInfoLibpod) as this is also (mostly) what the API actually returns.

The wrong response data seems to be from this struct: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/5c70641e4fcfa89691fdab79c260cc22df43372d/vendor/github.com/docker/docker/api/types/volume/cluster_volume.go#L402-L420

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Look at reference
2. Send request to `http://d/v4.0.0/libpod/info`
3. Compare responses


### Describe the results you received

Incorrect API reference.

### Describe the results you expected

Correct API reference.
